name: Patria Edificios Corporativos Fundo Investimento Imobiliario Fii
summary: Patria Edificios Corporativos Fundo Investimento Imobiliario Fii is a Brazilian real estate investment fund focused on acquiring and managing corporate buildings to generate income for its investors through rental yields. The fund's strategy involves investing in high-quality office properties in prime locations within Brazil. It is managed by Patria Investimentos.
